data.title: Integration test: mixed-corpus graceful-degrade (legacy + rollout tickets) across all 4 consumers
data.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Story
0263-62ba — Migrate 4 consumers to PRECONDITIONS, add compaction on epic-closure with ordering contract

## Objective
Write a mixed-corpus integration test that runs all 4 consumers (harvest-worktree, completion-verifier, merge-to-main archive, ticket CLI list/show) against a corpus containing both legacy tickets (zero PRECONDITIONS events) and rollout tickets (with events). All consumers must: (a) process rollout tickets with real summaries, (b) process legacy tickets with "pre-manifest" placeholder, (c) log once per (consumer, ticket) for zero-events, (d) never synthesize fake events.

## Test File to Create
`tests/integration/test-preconditions-mixed-corpus.sh` (new)

## .test-index entries required
- `plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib.sh: tests/integration/test-preconditions-mixed-corpus.sh [test_mixed_corpus_ticket_cli_all_consumers]`
- `plugins/dso/scripts/harvest-worktree.sh: tests/integration/test-preconditions-mixed-corpus.sh [test_mixed_corpus_harvest_legacy_degrade]`
- `plugins/dso/scripts/merge-to-main.sh: tests/integration/test-preconditions-mixed-corpus.sh [test_mixed_corpus_merge_archive_renders_correctly]`

## Test Approach (Given/When/Then)

**test_mixed_corpus_ticket_cli_all_consumers:**
- Given: a temp tracker dir with 3 tickets — ticket-A (2 PRECONDITIONS events), ticket-B (zero events, legacy), ticket-C (1 PRECONDITIONS event, snapshot compacted)
- When: `ticket-list.sh` runs against the temp tracker
- Then: ticket-A output contains `preconditions_summary.status != "pre-manifest"` (has real events); ticket-B output contains `preconditions_summary.status = "pre-manifest"`; ticket-C output returns the snapshot content; no error output

**test_mixed_corpus_harvest_legacy_degrade:**
- Given: a test worktree where the ticket being harvested has zero PRECONDITIONS events
- When: `harvest-worktree.sh` runs with `--ticket-id` pointing to the legacy ticket
- Then: exit 0; stderr contains "pre-manifest"; no unhandled error about missing PRECONDITIONS

**test_mixed_corpus_merge_archive_renders_correctly:**
- Given: a merge-to-main run with 2 tickets in scope — one with PRECONDITIONS, one without
- When: the archive phase executes
- Then: the phase log contains separate entries for each ticket — one with `preconditions_summary=<real>`, one with `preconditions_summary=pre-manifest`; phase exits 0

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `tests/integration/test-preconditions-mixed-corpus.sh` exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/integration/test-preconditions-mixed-corpus.sh
- [ ] All 3 test functions present
  Verify: grep -c "^test_mixed_corpus" tests/integration/test-preconditions-mixed-corpus.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 3)}'
- [ ] All 3 tests pass
  Verify: bash tests/integration/test-preconditions-mixed-corpus.sh
- [ ] .test-index updated with all 3 entries
  Verify: grep -c "test-preconditions-mixed-corpus.sh" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index | awk '{exit ($1 < 3)}'

## Retry Budget
MAX_ATTEMPTS: 3 (sonnet model)
On 3 consecutive sonnet failures: escalate to opus with full diagnostic context (all 3 failure messages)
On 3 consecutive opus failures (6 total): escalate to user with full failure history
If MAX_AGENTS: 0 at sonnet→opus escalation time: skip opus step, escalate to user immediately
